title: Unauthorized Access Investigation - SSH Brute Force and Privilege Escalation
executive_summary: The unauthorized access case shows brute force authentication attempts, a successful admin login, privilege escalation behavior, and suspicious remote file transfer activity.
forensic_conclusion: Evidence supports a critical unauthorized access incident requiring credential rotation, source host containment, log preservation, and privilege configuration review.
key_findings: Brute force pattern followed by successful login
Remote session and sensitive file transfer indicator
